title: Dekton Geckoslide 324pc PVA Furniture Pads Assorted-Premium Non-Slip Protection| Self-Adhesive Felt Pads| Reduces Noise & Prevents Scratches| For Chairs,Tables,and More| Durable & Versatile Cushioning
availability_text: Only 12 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Premium Non-Slip Protection: The Dekton Geckoslide 324pc PVA Furniture Pads offer superior protection for your floors and furniture with their premium non-slip PVA material. Designed to stay securely in place, these pads help prevent accidental slipping and sliding, ensuring your furniture remains stable and your floors remain pristine.

Self-Adhesive Felt Pads: Each pad features a strong self-adhesive backing for easy application. Simply peel off the protective layer and stick the pads to the bottom of your furniture legs. No tools or extra adhesives are required, making installation quick, hassle-free, and mess-free.

Reduces Noise & Prevents Scratches: The soft felt material effectively cushions furniture legs, reducing noise caused by moving chairs or tables. This padding also prevents scratches and scuffs on your floors, preserving the beauty of hardwood, laminate, tile, and other flooring types.

Durable & Long-Lasting Cushioning: Crafted from high-quality PVA and felt, these pads are designed to withstand regular use and provide long-lasting cushioning. The durable construction ensures that the pads retain their shape and effectiveness over time, even under heavy furniture.

Versatile Use for Various Furniture: Ideal for a wide range of furniture, including chairs, tables, cabinets, and more. The assortment of pad sizes ensures you have the right fit for different furniture legs, providing versatile and comprehensive protection for all your household items.
description: Introducing the Dekton Geckoslide 324pc PVA Furniture Pads Assorted, a premium solution designed to protect your floors and furniture while enhancing your home’s comfort and tranquility. These versatile self-adhesive felt pads are crafted from high-quality PVA material, offering superior non-slip protection and durability. Each pack includes a variety of sizes and shapes to accommodate different furniture pieces, from chairs and tables to cabinets and more. The advanced design of these furniture pads helps to reduce noise and prevent scratches, ensuring that your floors remain pristine even with frequent movement. The Dekton Geckoslide pads feature a strong adhesive backing that securely sticks to furniture legs and bases, providing a reliable cushioning layer that absorbs impact and minimizes friction. This helps to prevent damage to both your floors and furniture, extending the life of your investments and maintaining their pristine condition. The self-adhesive design makes installation quick and effortless—simply peel off the backing and apply the pads to the desired surface. These furniture pads are not only effective in protecting your floors but also versatile in their applications. Whether you’re placing them under dining chairs, sofa legs, or office furniture, they offer excellent cushioning and noise reduction, creating a quieter and more comfortable living environment. Their durability ensures that they will continue to perform well over time, even with heavy use.
